messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: A handoff was emitted as a zero-byte file and dispatched as a contentless task — the parcel was silently lost
What it solves: WHAT HAPPENED, VERIFIED ON DISK (not a report taken at face value — I looked).
`.worktrees/coder/.swarmforge/handoffs/sent/50_20260713T165246Z_000238_from_coder_to_cleaner.handoff`
is **0 bytes**, written 2026-07-13 17:52. Its siblings from the same mailbox — 000235, 000236,
000237, 000241 — are 27…
How it works: A corrupt handoff is never dispatched to a role as work
